text: hey dad, you still doing that bbq thing saturday or nah?
Yeah still on! Your aunt Rosa's coming too so probably around 6. You bringing Maya?
yeah she's in 😄 want us to grab anything on the way? drinks or dessert or smth
hey dad you and mom doing anything saturday night? was thinking of coming over for dinner
yeah we're free! your mom's been wanting to make her lamb chops. come around 6 bring dessert lol
perfect 😂 I'll grab that tiramisu you like from the place on maple. see you guys then!
Hey can you pick up Jaylen from soccer at 5 instead of me? I'm stuck at work
yeah no prob. does he need cleats or did u pack em already
They're in his bag already. Thank you, seriously 🙏
hey babe, how's your day going? 😊
pretty good actually, just got out of that meeting finally lol. missing you though
aww, almost done here too. want me to come over later? 🥺
Hey Carlos! Just wanted to check in — how are you feeling today? Did you get some rest?
Much better, thanks for asking sweetheart 😊 Slept pretty well actually. How are the kids doing?
They're great! Mia keeps asking when you're coming over lol. We miss you, let's plan something soon!
Hey Grandpa! Just thinking about you 😊 how are you feeling today?
Elise! What a nice surprise. I'm doing just fine, had a good walk this morning. How's school treating you?
So glad!! School's crazy busy but I'm hanging in there 😅 let's catch up on the phone soon, I miss your voice!
hey dad, you still doing that bbq thing saturday or nah?
